log: === INITIATIVE ===
Young Red Dragon: 16 (d20:16 + 0)
Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician: 15 (d20:13 + 2)
=== ROUND 1 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon descends and moves from (8,0) to (0,0) [40ft].
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 27 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 40/67
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 21/67
Young Red Dragon attack 3: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS!
⚡ Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:19 total 29 vs AC 14 — still hits.
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician casts Hypnotic Pattern (3rd level)
→ AoE hits 1 target(s)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL
→ Young Red Dragon gains: charmed_hp, incapacitated
Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician for 7. HP: 28/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 11 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician for 9. HP: 37/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 25 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 12/67
→ Concentration save: [16 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Deep Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
